title: Checking Gauge Development
description: Developed comprehensive checking gauge system for dimensional verification with full BOM and assembly documentation.
objectives: Verify hole locations and surface profile
solution: Engineered a high-precision checking gauge with a robust aluminum base plate. Integrated custom Delrin rests to prevent part scratching and utilized precise go/no-go pins for instant hole verification on the assembly line.
lessonsLearned: Using standard gauge components reduces cost by 20%
CMM verification of the gauge itself is critical
